scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 6 read streams (orders, products, subscriptions, discounts, bundles/packages, and licenses via a products-id fan-out) and 13 write actions covering product/subscription/discount/bundle lifecycle mutations plus order-level financial/administrative actions (refund, cancel_subscription, resend_email). Excluded: multipart file-upload product/bundle creation (SendOwl's real create-with-file endpoint requires a multipart/form-data body carrying the digital asset itself, which this dialect's body_type json/form/none set cannot express), search/shopify_lookup convenience aliases that return the same record shape an already-covered list stream provides, discount sub-collection endpoints (discount_codes/discount_orderables) which are narrower slices of the already-covered discounts record, license per-key validation/creation (a single-key or bulk-import operation with no list-shaped semantics), and destructive/account-security order actions (access grant/revoke, download_restrictions reset, override_country) that mutate account-security-adjacent state rather than ordinary business data.

excluded.reason: term/email search alias over the same order record shape the orders stream already reads in full
single-order detail; identical record shape to the orders list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
buyer name/email/giftee/shipping-address/tag correction on an already-placed order; narrow account-support workflow, not modeled as a write action this pass
resets a buyer's download-attempt counter; account-support action with no corresponding readable record shape to validate against
overrides buyer country for tax-jurisdiction purposes; narrow account-support workflow, not modeled as a write action this pass
grants back a previously revoked buyer's download access; a security-sensitive access-control action distinct from ordinary business-data mutation
revokes a buyer's download access; a security-sensitive access-control action distinct from ordinary business-data mutation
name-search alias over the same product record shape the products stream already reads in full
Shopify-variant-id lookup alias over the same product record shape the products stream already reads in full
single-product detail; identical record shape to the products list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
manually issues a one-off order for a product outside SendOwl's own checkout/payment-gateway flow; a specialized order-creation shape distinct from ordinary product/subscription/bundle field mutation
name-search alias over the same subscription record shape the subscriptions stream already reads in full
single-subscription detail; identical record shape to the subscriptions list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
manually issues a one-off order for a subscription outside SendOwl's own checkout/payment-gateway flow; a specialized order-creation shape distinct from ordinary field mutation
single-discount detail; identical record shape to the discounts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
discount-code search alias over the same discount record shape the discounts stream already reads in full
per-discount code sub-collection; a narrower slice of the same discount record the discounts stream already reads, not a distinct top-level resource
bulk discount-code generation sub-action; narrower scope than the top-level create_discount write this pass models
single discount-code removal sub-action; narrower scope than the top-level delete_discount write this pass models
per-discount product-restriction sub-collection; a narrower slice of the same discount record the discounts stream already reads
adds a per-product usage restriction to a discount; narrower scope than the top-level update_discount write this pass models
removes a per-product usage restriction from a discount; narrower scope than the top-level update_discount write this pass models
name-search alias over the same bundle record shape the bundles stream already reads in full
Shopify-variant-id lookup alias over the same bundle record shape the bundles stream already reads in full
single-bundle detail; identical record shape to the bundles list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

SendOwl's documented bundle-create request accepts multipart/form-data component product selection plus optional asset metadata; this dialect's body_type json/form/none set has no multipart support (see docs.md Known limits) -- update_bundle/delete_bundle remain covered since they mutate/remove an EXISTING bundle by id with no file payload
manually issues a one-off order for a bundle outside SendOwl's own checkout/payment-gateway flow; a specialized order-creation shape distinct from ordinary field mutation
per-order license sub-collection; the same license record shape is already reached, product-scoped, by the licenses fan-out stream
bulk-creates license records from caller-supplied keys; a batch import action distinct from this pass's per-record write-action shape
single license-key validity check, not a syncable object read or a record mutation
